reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Spec deviation confirmed: BlobRPCMinValidSlot does not implement Fulu deprecation requirement (should reject all requests after FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS). Function continues calculating minStart = currEpoch - minReqEpochs, allowing recent blob requests indefinitely. Attack path is straightforward (P2P peer sends BlobSidecarsByRangeRequest post-deadline), but the claimed impact of 'preventing migration to data columns' lacks concrete exploitability—unclear how serving deprecated blobs directly blocks network-wide migration. Passed all 3 gates: (1) function actively used by multiple callers, (2) entry point is untrusted P2P, (3) Fusaka-specific (Fulu fork) and in scope. Severity remains Medium—protocol compliance issue affecting single client (Prysm, 31% CL share) but not causing immediate validator slashing, network splits, or consensus failures.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: blob_sidecars_by_range must be fully deprecated after FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS
